description_long: This is a classic rectangular billiard table with a green felt playing surface, set atop a sturdy wooden frame. The table features six visible pocket openings, one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side, all integrated into the dark rail cushions. The legs are robust and rectangular, made of wood, and are arranged in pairs along the length of the table, providing strong support. The table sits on a circular wooden platform, which may serve as a decorative or protective base. The rail cushions are dark, contrasting with the green felt, and the overall finish of the table is glossy, suggesting a polished wood exterior. No visible markings, branding, or wear are present on the playing surface or rails, indicating the table is in excellent condition.
description: A polished wooden billiard table with green felt, six pockets, and sturdy rectangular legs, set on a circular wooden platform. The table is in pristine condition with dark rail cushions and no visible wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long side of the table, three legs, and two corner pockets with the green felt surface visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the short end of the table, two legs, and the end rail with a single visible pocket.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the opposite long side, three legs, and two corner pockets.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the short end, two legs, and the end rail with a single pocket.
attribute_pocket_openings: Six pocket openings are visible: four rounded corner pockets and two side pockets at the midpoint of each long rail. All pockets are open and appear to be of standard size, with no covers or distinctive features.
attribute_rail_cushions: The rail cushions are dark, likely rubber with a black or very dark brown covering, and have a smooth, slightly glossy profile. No visible markings, branding, or wear are present, and the cushions appear to be in excellent condition with a classic straight-edged style.
attribute_leg_design: The table has six rectangular wooden legs, arranged in three pairs along the length. The legs are thick, straight, and unadorned, with no decorative elements or visible supports beyond the main frame.
attribute_felt_covering: The playing surface is covered in green felt, which appears smooth, even, and free of visible seams, wear, or branding. The felt looks standard and well-maintained, with no signs of repairs or custom patterns.
